root_cause_summary: The accepted event did not match the billable metric because the submitted property name differed from the configured property.
root_cause_details: Event Search showed the event was ingested with token_cost_usd, while the billable metric filter expected cost_usd. Ingestion succeeded, but billing did not count the event because the configured property was absent.
resolution_summary: Updated the customer's event payload to send cost_usd and confirmed the billable metric matched on the next test event.
resolution_steps: Opened Event Search for transaction tx-property-filter.
Compared event properties with the billable metric configuration.
Changed the payload from token_cost_usd to cost_usd.
verification_steps: Use Event Search to confirm the corrected property is present.
Verify the billable metric matches the corrected event.
Verify invoice usage increases for the billing period.
verification_results: Event Search showed cost_usd on the corrected event.
The billable metric matched after the property name was corrected.
Invoice usage reflected the corrected event in the current period.
